title: Fix disallowed origin error for draft subdomain in Google Search Console

requirements.summary: Replace all draft subdomain references with production domain across frontend files to resolve Google Search Console disallowed origin error
acceptanceCriteria: No occurrence of 'everyday-silver-qev-draft.caffeine.xyz' exists in frontend/index.html, frontend/public/sitemap.xml, frontend/public/robots.txt, or any component file.
The canonical <link> tag in frontend/index.html points to https://verdiercouverture.fr.
Open Graph og:url and Twitter Card url tags in frontend/index.html point to https://verdiercouverture.fr.
JSON-LD structured data in frontend/index.html references https://verdiercouverture.fr as the URL.
frontend/public/sitemap.xml lists only https://verdiercouverture.fr/ as the canonical URL.
frontend/public/robots.txt Sitemap directive points to https://verdiercouverture.fr/sitemap.xml.
Google Search Console no longer reports a disallowed origin error for the draft subdomain.

file_operations.description: Audit and replace any references to the draft subdomain (https://everyday-silver-qev-draft.caffeine.xyz) in the canonical link tag, Open Graph og:url tag, Twitter Card url tag, and JSON-LD structured data url property. Ensure all these meta tags and structured data exclusively point to https://verdiercouverture.fr. Verify the Google Site Verification meta tag contains no draft domain references.

Replace any occurrence of the draft subdomain URL (https://everyday-silver-qev-draft.caffeine.xyz) in the <loc> elements with the production domain https://verdiercouverture.fr/. Ensure the sitemap lists only the canonical production URL.

Replace any reference to the draft subdomain (https://everyday-silver-qev-draft.caffeine.xyz) in the Sitemap directive with https://verdiercouverture.fr/sitemap.xml. Ensure the robots.txt points exclusively to the production sitemap URL.

Audit the Google Site Verification file for any draft subdomain references and remove them if present. Do not alter the verification meta tag content or structure, only ensure no draft domain URLs appear anywhere in the file.

Search for and replace any hardcoded references to the draft subdomain (https://everyday-silver-qev-draft.caffeine.xyz) with https://verdiercouverture.fr in strings, comments, or data structures. If no references exist, no changes are needed.

Search for and replace any hardcoded references to the draft subdomain (https://everyday-silver-qev-draft.caffeine.xyz) with https://verdiercouverture.fr in strings, comments, or data structures. If no references exist, no changes are needed.

Search for and replace any hardcoded references to the draft subdomain (https://everyday-silver-qev-draft.caffeine.xyz) with https://verdiercouverture.fr in strings, comments, or data structures. If no references exist, no changes are needed.

Search for and replace any hardcoded references to the draft subdomain (https://everyday-silver-qev-draft.caffeine.xyz) with https://verdiercouverture.fr in strings, comments, or data structures. If no references exist, no changes are needed.

Search for and replace any hardcoded references to the draft subdomain (https://everyday-silver-qev-draft.caffeine.xyz) with https://verdiercouverture.fr in strings, comments, or data structures. If no references exist, no changes are needed.

Search for and replace any hardcoded references to the draft subdomain (https://everyday-silver-qev-draft.caffeine.xyz) with https://verdiercouverture.fr in strings, comments, or data structures. If no references exist, no changes are needed.

Search for and replace any hardcoded references to the draft subdomain (https://everyday-silver-qev-draft.caffeine.xyz) with https://verdiercouverture.fr in strings, comments, or data structures. If no references exist, no changes are needed.

Search for and replace any hardcoded references to the draft subdomain (https://everyday-silver-qev-draft.caffeine.xyz) with https://verdiercouverture.fr in strings, comments, or structured data markup. Ensure any Schema.org Review structured data references the production domain only. If no references exist, no changes are needed.

Search for and replace any hardcoded references to the draft subdomain (https://everyday-silver-qev-draft.caffeine.xyz) with https://verdiercouverture.fr in strings, comments, or data structures. If no references exist, no changes are needed.
